scene_summary: A misty gallery-procession scene with a vast rose translucent backdrop, visible music/display objects, carried illuminated artifacts, a right-side bronze instrument pavilion, and a readable source catalogue placard in the foreground.
usable_surfaces: bronze drum pavilion and gong structure

detected_objects.label: Rose Expectation Proscenium
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A vast continuous pink translucent panelled scrim spans the upper half of the scene with forest/collage texture and vertical seams.

detected_objects.label: Black Acid-Electro Speaker Monolith
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Tall black rectangular speaker tower on the left with stacked circular drivers and small glowing green centers.

detected_objects.label: Air / Earth Weather Veil
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A glowing translucent cylindrical curtain or veil stands beside the left procession figure, filled with rain-like vertical texture.

detected_objects.label: ArtStar Brass Address Mailbox
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Small polished brass wall-mounted box or plaque with an address/mailbox form, centered on a grey pillar.

detected_objects.label: Lucid Landscape Terrain Tray
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Central figure carries a shallow illuminated tray containing clear glowing mountain-like topographic forms.

detected_objects.label: Cameron Portrait Lantern
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Oval glowing hanging portrait medallion with a painted face and small tassel below.

detected_objects.label: Rear Lit Shelf Vitrine
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Back wall contains a small illuminated shelving cabinet with rows of tiny glowing objects or containers.

detected_objects.label: Jaipong Bronze Drum Pavilion
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large ornate bronze-and-black performance pavilion on the right with gongs, bowls, carved frame, and warm internal lights.

detected_objects.label: Source Catalogue Plaque
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Foreground black angled sign clearly reads 'SOURCE CATALOGUE' with a short list of items beneath.

detected_objects.label: Rose Expectation Proscenium
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source artifact from the scene brief.
